title: RUMOR September being considered for release Grain of salt
display_title: RUMOR September being considered for release Grain of salt
wikitext:
[]: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 10:41 am Take it with a grain of salt, yadda yadda. I don't wanna cause false hype. I explain it here: http://kuribo4indahouse.tumblr.com/post ... a-overhype I can give more detailed translations if you want.

[]: Re: September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by hui43210 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 11:13 am He expects it in 2019, and I would as well. September seems like a really quick turnaround for an animation project of this size, and I expect the marketing campaign to kick into high gear long before release. Seems a little quite for it to be only 8 months away.

[]: Re: September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 11:19 am Yeah, I see your point. But then something like 2.0 was apparently made in a year and a half. By the end of this year it will have been 2 and a half years since Shin Godzilla. I'm also pretty sure Anno went into this project knowing what he wanted to do (even back in 2013 he was working on a script). Is my impatience apparent or what? (I'm not the type of person to be angry because they take their time, I have massive respect for what they do, just really wanna see this movie lol).

[]: Re: September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Feb 03, 2018 11:20 am It will not be released in 2018. I'm 99.9% certain of it. Remember that our first teaser for 3.0 (Asuka in SPACE!) came in August of 2011 , more than a year before the eventual release date. The international title was released January 1st of 2012, and I think that was when the fall release date was announced. At this point we don't have a formal teaser (that is, if you don't count UYCTM) and we don't have an international title. I think the best time to look forward to news will be April 1st, which was the date that Shin Godzilla was announced and is apparently also the start of the fiscal cycle in Japan.

[]: Re: September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 11:24 am I agree with the April 1st thing (and it would be hilarious because people will think it's an April's Fool joke like with Godzilla). I don't know if we should look at marketing for previous entries though. I feel like that is a case by case thing. Also, while we don't have the international title, we do have a poster. That's something. Also this movie has like 4 titles by now lol. I think Shin Eva is the more important one to them.

[]: Re: September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Feb 03, 2018 12:33 pm This Spanish youtuber (guy lives in Japan) just gave it a try and asked for the Eva release in the official Store. After laughing the employee said august/september is being considered. But that it could be later too. The employee said he expects it 2019.

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 12:44 pm That was my gut reaction too. Because the internet has taught me to not believe anything. However I was a trainee last year at a pharmaceutical company, my only job being to send whatever drugs were ordered to the ordering drug stores. And I knew exactly what new top secret medicines that no competitor should know about would release the year after and what their secondary effects were or could be. So there's that. Also if marketing were to start soon, merchandising included, I don't know why EvaStore employess wouldn't know. This is obviously unconfirmed information, I have no reason to think it's untrue though. I'm like 100% sure the guy on YouTube isn't lying. Who knows about the store guy. But it could be. Time will tell (hopefully soon).

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Feb 03, 2018 1:41 pm If Khara doesn’t announce it the news is nonsense. An employee at a merchandise store would know nothing and even if they did - they don’t - his releasing of such important news before the official announcement date would be a cause for immediate firing. As for the YouTuber it got people somewhere talking about his stuff. Until the Official Khara &/or official Evangelion websites give a date anything you hear online is 100% made up. One month later we’ll go through this whole nonsense again when an obscure evangelion fansite, some dude on reddit or some inane you tuber posts a release date with zero verification. And a month after that. And so on until an official release date is given by the filmmakers.

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 1:59 pm ∆ We'll see is all I'll add to that.

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by Joseki » Sun Feb 04, 2018 5:37 am Guy Nacks wrote: It will not be released in 2018. I'm 99.9% certain of it. Remember that our first teaser for 3.0 (Asuka in SPACE!) came in August of 2011 , more than a year before the eventual release date. The international title was released January 1st of 2012, and I think that was when the fall release date was announced. At this point we don't have a formal teaser (that is, if you don't count UYCTM) and we don't have an international title. I think the best time to look forward to news will be April 1st, which was the date that Shin Godzilla was announced and is apparently also the start of the fiscal cycle in Japan.

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 04, 2018 7:13 am You did a good breakdown. That's also why I think the movie can come out this year. They'll wait for an actual release date. And lol at the people on twitter losing their mind. But sort of relatable too.

[]: Re: [RUMOR] September being considered for release? (Grain of salt) Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 04, 2018 7:42 am I feel like we're done here.
